name: @skelm/coding-agent
description: Project-agnostic coding-agent workflow on the native @skelm/agent backend.

workflows.description: Read project instructions, edit code, run profile-gated validation.

config.workspace: absolute path to the repository the agent operates in
config.backend: backend id of the native @skelm/agent backend (default: agent)
config.profile: ProjectProfile: executableProfiles, prExecutableProfiles, allowedExecutables, validationCommands, branchPrefix, baseBranch, allowHosts
config.budget: AgentBudget safety ceiling: tokenBudget, maxCostUsd, maxToolCalls, maxWallClockMs

secrets.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
secrets.description: Only resolved when PR opening is enabled and granted; name only.
